name: Sikkim

seo.description: Compare 425+ verified packers and movers in Sikkim. Gangtok, Gyalshing & across the state. Instant quotes starting ₹6,000. KYC-verified.

hero.title: Packers & Movers in Sikkim
hero.subtitle: Gangtok to Gyalshing and across the Himalayas — 425+ verified movers in Sikkim.

intro:
Sikkim, nestled in the eastern Himalayas beneath Kanchenjunga, is India's smallest state by area but one of its most unique relocation markets. ShiftIndia connects you with 425+ verified movers across Gangtok and Gyalshing, covering the entire state through our mountain-specialist network.

From Gangtok's ridge-top government housing and tourist-zone apartments to the remote western district of Gyalshing, our KYC-verified vendors are equipped with small vehicles capable of navigating Sikkim's steep switchback roads.
whyUs: Sikkim's mountain roads, weight-restricted bridges and annual heavy monsoon make it one of India's most technically demanding states for relocation. Our vendors use vehicle types appropriate for Sikkim's terrain, carry ₹5 lakh damage coverage and provide GPS tracking on all bookings.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Sikkim?
faqs.a: Local moves within Gangtok start at ₹6,000. Gangtok to Siliguri (113 km, mountain route) typically costs ₹10,000–₹16,000 including packing.

faqs.q: Which cities in Sikkim does ShiftIndia cover?
faqs.a: We cover Gangtok and Gyalshing (Geyzing). For remote areas, we coordinate through our Northeast and North Bengal network.

faqs.q: Do you operate in Sikkim during monsoon season?
faqs.a: Yes, with caution. Landslide-prone stretches on NH-10 can cause delays June–September. We maintain flexibility on dates and monitor BRO road bulletins for all Sikkim moves.

faqs.q: Can you handle moves from Sikkim to Siliguri or Darjeeling?
faqs.a: Yes. Gangtok–Siliguri and Gangtok–Darjeeling are standard routes with GPS tracking and transit insurance, coordinated with our West Bengal team.
